item.description: ‘I believe it’s going to make a huge difference.’

item.description: He breached orders eight times before the attack. Now experts say he may never change.

item.description: The crowd at Albert Park was in a state of shock when disaster struck for the hometown hero.

item.description: The teammates finished well clear of the field after Ferrari’s pit strategy failed miserably.

item.description: The Aussie cut a dejected figure as he apologised to fans for the devastating situation.

item.description: The much-loved champion was chaired off the field as she bid farewell to cricket.

item.description: ‘I did everything in my power to stop it from happening.’

item.description: ‘We’re the ones driving and just waiting for something to go horribly wrong.’

item.description: The pair already have some serious history despite only sharing the track at five events.

item.description: The 26-year-old has defected to Super Rugby, effective immediately.

item.description: Kidman is listed as the primary parent of their two children after the divorce was finalised.

item.description: Samsung just dropped the Galaxy S26 and we’ve found the hack that can slice up to $700 off your upgrade.

item.description: Optus customers can now score a free Pixel 9a when they sign up for any Pixel 10 mobile plan.

item.description: The Duchess of Sussex launched her lifestyle brand with the streaming site in 2025.

item.description: ‘I was staggered to see this.’

item.title: Volkswagen to cut 50,000 jobs after 53 per cent profit plunge
item.description: The German automaker has pointed to falling sales in China and the US – where EV adoption has slowed – behind the decision.

item.title: Truck driver killed after being hit by his own vehicle on the Pacific Highway in north Sydney
item.description: An investigation is now underway to figure out how the tragedy happened.

item.title: The $15 million Newport property that comes with its own private beach
item.description: If you're sick of busy beaches, this might be the home for you.

item.title: From radio waves to real estate: inside Kyle and Jackie O's property portfolios
item.description: The top-paid radio hosts signed a $200 million contract in 2023.

item.title: Evergreen Aussie run machine Beth Mooney hits jackpot in The Hundred auction
item.description: The 32-year-old run machine went for nearly five times more than her captain.

item.title: Mercedes-Benz VLE: Electric people mover revealed, Australian timing unclear
item.description: The Mercedes-Benz VLE people mover boasts bolder styling, a highly configurable interior, and electric motivation.

item.title: Bodies of two tourists found dead in car submerged in Queensland floodwaters
item.description: The pair were on their way to start farm work when they found themselves in trouble.
